visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand side-by-side in a warehouse store aisle. The woman on the left wears a brown jacket and a checkered skirt, holding a blue Zootopia-themed bottle. The woman on the right wears a white bucket hat and a white off-the-shoulder dress, holding a green bottle. A large red and blue Costco logo is overlayed at the top. (2) The camera zooms in for a close-up on the two water bottles. The left bottle is blue with a Judy Hopps character head on top. The right bottle is green with a Nick Wilde character head on top. The characters have detailed facial expressions and sculpted features. (3) A white price tag is shown on a green shelf beam, displaying the product name 'DISNEY KID THERMAL BOTTLE' and the price '$459'. The warehouse background is blurred with stacks of cardboard boxes. (4) The woman on the right demonstrates the bottle's lid. She presses a button, and the character-themed cap flips open to reveal a clear straw. Her hand movements are precise as she interacts with the object's mechanical parts. (5) The presenters hold the bottles close together, highlighting the color difference between the light blue and matcha green. They maintain eye contact with the camera and smile. Pink and yellow variety-style text overlays appear at the bottom. (6) Both women wave towards the camera while holding their respective bottles. They are positioned in the same warehouse aisle filled with stacked blue product boxes. The video ends with a quick cut from this medium shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 動物方程式 最新不鏽鋼水壺. (2) [Variety]: 超級可愛. (3) [Subtitle]: 首先是我的尼克. (4) [Subtitle]: 那茱蒂呢. (5) [Slogan]: $ 459. (6) [Variety]: 徽章的感覺. (7) [Variety]: 咚~. (8) [Slogan]: 459元. (9) [Slogan]: 趕快買哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female presenters are prominently featured in the foreground throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has dark brown hair and wears a brown cropped jacket over a beige checkered skirt. The other woman has long black hair, a white bucket hat, and a white striped off-the-shoulder dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store with high ceilings, industrial lighting, and massive metal shelving units stacked with blue and green cardboard boxes containing the featured products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins an enthusiastic delivery over an upbeat electronic pop background track. The music has a steady percussive beat and bright synthesizer textures. The speaker's voice is extremely clear with a professional broadcast quality and high emotional arousal. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers during the presentation, marking the appearance of the product price. The narrator's pitch becomes more dynamic as he emphasizes the aesthetic appeal of the bottles. The background music remains continuous and well-balanced with the vocal layer. (3) A distinct mechanical 'click' and 'pop' sound effect is audible when the spring-loaded lid of the water bottle is demonstrated. The narrator maintains a fast speech rate, describing the material and capacity of the product with high vocal confidence and a positive valence. (4) A final electronic stinger sound effect plays as the video concludes. The narrator delivers a high-energy call to action, encouraging shoppers to hurry to the store. The background music fades sharply at the very end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Pricing -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and showcase new Zootopia-themed thermal water bottles sold at Costco. The video uses energetic narration and close-up product demonstrations to encourage fans of the movie and warehouse shoppers to make a purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly features the Costco logo, displays the price tag, and provides a direct verbal recommendation to buy the specific product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media shopping guide video that relies on high-energy audio and bright, product-focused visuals to drive impulse interest.
